## Description :information_source:

_Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change._

## Related Task/Ticket :ticket:

_Link to the Jira ticket or issue related to this PR, e.g., SDK-1234_

## Visuals (Screenshots/Recordings) :camera:

|                Before                |              After              |
| :----------------------------------: | :-----------------------------: |
| _Screenshot/Video of previous state_ | _Screenshot/Video of new state_ |

## Type of Change :page_facing_up:

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change

## Checklist :ballot_box_with_check:

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] I have run `flutter analyze` and fixed any issues
- [ ] I have run `flutter test` and ensured all tests pass
- [ ] I have tested on Android/iOS emulators or devices

## What's changed :orange_book:

_Example:_

- 🔧 Updated `pubspec.yaml` dependencies
- ✨ Added new `CoinDetailScreen` in `features/coin_detail`
- 🐛 Fixed crash on launch
